info.title: DoorLoop Property Management API
info.description: DoorLoop's REST API provides two-way access to read and write property management data including properties, units, leases, tenants, payments, charges, credits, owners, vendors, expenses, tasks, communications, notes, files, and reports.

200.description: List of tenants on the lease

post.summary: Post an update on a task

apiKey.name: Authorization
apiKey.description: API key for authentication. Format: Bearer {api_key}

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
